+ back to UGC Video Creator Workflow
UGC Video Creator Workflow

Step 09 — B-Roll Generation

Take all the images you generated for the B-roll part of the workflow and animate them. The key to seamless, realistic video is one smooth action per clip. Use first-frame and last-frame both when you know exactly how a shot should end, for example when the model shows the product to camera and you want it to look correct. On Kling, 2.6 is the best video model as of early 2026; use 2.5 Turbo for quicker, cheaper generations. In most cases keep native audio off — you'll add music, sound effects, and voiceover in the final edit.

Kling uses the shared team Glamrs login.
